title: Vanilla Shears
description: Adds more shears using vanilla tool materials
body:
# Vanilla Shears A Minecraft Fabric mod adding more shears using vanilla tool materials. Requires Fabric API
![Wooden Shears](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Apis035/vanilla-shears/1.18/images/wooden_shears.png) ![Stone Shears](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Apis035/vanilla-shears/1.18/images/stone_shears.png) ![Golden Shears](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Apis035/vanilla-shears/1.18/images/golden_shears.png) ![Diamond Shears](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Apis035/vanilla-shears/1.18/images/diamond_shears.png) ![Netherite Shears](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Apis035/vanilla-shears/1.18/images/netherite_shears.png) ## Recipe All shears are crafted using their respective materials using same pattern as iron shears. All shears have same the same durability as other tools from their crafted materials minus 12. - **Wooden Shears** crafted using wooden planks - **Stone Shears** crafted using cobblestone - **Golden Shears** crafted using gold ingot - **Diamond Shears** crafted using diamond - **Netherite Shears** crafted using netherite ingot ## Issues This mod is still far from completion, please report any found issues on GitHub
